full_text:
Cen Ke 岑軻
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cen Ke (岑軻)was born in Nanyang. From noted family, served under Sun Quan. Cen Ke was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
